name: Vaucluse (France)
description: Quarterly: first quarter red with two crossed keys, one gold and one white; second quarter blue with a gold fleur-de-lis below a red bar; third quarter blue with a gold fess, a blue horn above and green plants below; fourth quarter red with three gold keys in pale.
history: The arms quarter the crossed keys of the papal Comtat Venaissin with the fleur-de-lis of Provence and emblems of the territories joined to form the department.

features.role: crossed keys in first quarter and keys in fourth quarter
horn and plants in third quarter
